---
image: website-photo.jpg
about:
  template: trestles 
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15rem
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/tselmena
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tselmen-anuurad/
---

Hello there! My name is Tselmen Anuurad, but I usually go by Tsel (pronounced like "cell"). I expect to receive my B.S. in Statistics and Data Science from the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA) in June 2026. 

After graduation, I plan to pursue doctoral studies in Biostatistics. My research interests include **clinical trials**, **longitudinal and survival analysis**, and **causal inference** with applications to neurodegenerative diseases. I am very excited about the intersection of statistics and medicine, and I look forward to continue to use utilize and advance biostatistical methods to create real-world public health solutions.
